zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie de Bar Mousson於1066年出生在法國布格時，她的父親Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson51歲，母親Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia49歲。她和Volmar von Frohburg Count至少有2個兒子。她去世於1105年在德國薩辛可萊斯 波納福洛賀包格享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophie de Bar Mousson于1066年出生在法国布格时，她的父亲Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson51岁，母亲Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia49岁。她和Volmar von Frohburg Count至少有2个儿子。她去世于1105年在德国薩辛可萊斯 波納福洛賀包格享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Mousson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Chantal, Gaston, Monique.
French: from Old French pousson, a spirit made from linseed oil or hemp, hence a metonymic occupational name for someone who made this. In the US, this surname is found mainly in LA.
History: Jean-Bertrand Pousson from Lespiteau in Haute-Garonne, France, married Joséphine Guillory in Opelousas, LA, in 1843.

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sofie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sophie .

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie de Bar Mousson was born in 1066, in Burgundy, France, her father, Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson, was 51 and her mother, Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia, was 49. She had at least 2 sons with Volmar von Frohburg Count. She died in 1105, in Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie de Bar Mousson est née en 1066, à Bourgogne, France, son père, Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia, avait 49 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Volmar von Frohburg Count. Elle est décédée en 1105, à Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie de Bar Mousson 1066 in Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson 51 und ihre Mutter Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia 49. Sie hatte mit Volmar von Frohburg Count mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1105 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Sachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie de Bar Mousson è nata il nel 1066 nel Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia, aveva 49 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Volmar von Frohburg Count. Morì nel 1105, nel Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophie de Bar Moussonが1066年にフランスボウルゴグンで生まれた時，父Louis de Montbéliard-Moussonは51歳，母Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingiaは49歳であった。彼女はVolmar von Frohburg Countとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1105年にドイツサチセンクレイス ボルナフロhブルグで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sophie de Bar Mousson(이)가 1066년 프랑스 부르고그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 Volmar von Frohburg Count(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1105년 독일 작센 크레이스 본아 프로h버그에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie de Bar Mousson nasceu em 1066, em Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia, tinha 49 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Volmar von Frohburg Count. Ela faleceu em 1105, em Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie de Bar Mousson родилась в 1066 г. в местности бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia, 49. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Volmar von Frohburg Count. Она умерла в 1105 г. в местности фрохбург, крис борна, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 39 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Volmar von Frohburg Count. Murió en 1105, en Frohburg, Kreis Borna, Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 39 años.
